title: Specialized Engineering Solutions
content:
As a leading specialized engineering company in UAE, Fabtech International is committed to engineering innovative, cost-effective, and efficient building system designs that perform to deliver safe, comfortable, and reliable environments. Composed of qualified and professional staff, we are adept at providing efficient engineering solutions, including storage tanks, skid packages, mud gas systems, pig launcher/receivers, and piping structures. In addition, we also render platforms & ladders, stack, ducts, and similar fabrication often required in process industries. With a sincere commitment to quality, client satisfaction, and high professional standards, we take pride in our proven expertise in building the world’s tallest flagpole. In addition, we have majorly contributed to the world’s only 3 axis bridge and have offered our specialization in projects including ship lifters, mock up air crafts, jack up legs, and special crane systems.
With an extensive knowledge of local and international business coupled with a synergy of knowledge and expertise from a multi-cultural staff with the highest standards of professionalism and integrity, Fabtech International is well situated in offering specialized engineering solutions across UAE. Our Electrical and Instrumentation Division has the proven capability to carry out several electrification and instrumentation job in the Oil & Gas industry. They are highly competent in managing procurement, planning, installing, testing, and commissioning every industrial requirement in both HV and LV. These apply to Transformers, Distribution Boards, Motor Control Centers, Local Control Stations, Lighting Systems, Power Systems, Earthing Systems, Race Ways, PLCs, Instruments, and Impulse Tubing. As industry experts, our capability and experience in specialized turn-key projects which demand high proficiency to handle specialized equipment and machinery enable us to offer our customers a truly unrivaled experience.



MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
